content.en:
"No, it's a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm like you!"

The Lord of the Ancient replied very seriously.

"What, a half-step perfection controller of the Extreme Creation Realm like me?" The Yueli controller was stunned, how could such a half-step perfection controller of the Extreme Creation Realm guide her?

"Old Ancestor, even if the other party comprehends the Extreme Dao of Water among the half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm, they can't help me much, right?" said the Yueli controller with some disappointment.

"No, that person may really be able to help you, his talent and understanding are beyond your imagination, and his understanding of the Extreme Dao is far beyond that of many super-perfect masters, I really can't find a more suitable person than him, Ancestor. The Lord of the Ancient said with a smile.

The Yueli Controller was stunned for a moment and asked, "Old Ancestor, you shouldn't be talking about Ye Tian, the Infinite Controller, right?"

"Indeed, it's him!"

The Lord of the Ancient nodded.

The Yueli controller hurriedly said: "Old Ancestor, Ye Tian obviously didn't master the Extreme Dao of Water, how could he teach me!"

"Who told you that he didn't master the Extreme Dao of Water?" said the Lord of the Ancients.

"On the Extreme Dao List, all the Extreme Paths he has comprehended have been displayed, and there is no Water Extreme Dao among them!" said the Moon Glass Master.

"You underestimated Ye Tian, as for Ye Tian's Water Extreme Dao that did not appear on the Extreme Dao list, naturally it was the Ancestor I helped him hide the Extreme Dao of Water, and the number of Extreme Dao he comprehended is beyond your imagination. In short, you have to be polite when he teaches you. The Lord of the Ancients reminded.

"Yes!"

The moon glass controller nodded slightly.

......

Ye Tian's Daoless Tower is a sub-tower.

The Moon Glass Controller came here under the arrangement of the Lord of the Ancients.

Of course, the Moon Glass Controller herself was a little reluctant to do this, she didn't think that Ye Tian would be able to help her.

However, this is the arrangement of the Lord of the Ancients, and she must get it.

"If Ye Tian can't help me, I'll talk to the old ancestor and don't let him teach me!"

The Moonglass Controller thought to himself.

Soon, she saw Ye Tian.

"Hello Endless Master!"

The moon glass controller is still the same cold look.

"Yueli master, just call me Ye Tian, and in the future, I will teach you the extreme way of comprehending water. Ye Tian said very seriously.

The master of the moon glass asked curiously: "Ye Tian, the Lord of the Ancient Ancestor asked you to teach me, I am curious, have you really comprehended the Extreme Dao of Water?"

Ye Tian smiled slightly, and the power of the Water Extreme Dao appeared on his body.

"I really comprehended the Extreme Dao of Water, this guy is hiding so deeply!"

The moon glass controller was secretly surprised.

At this time, she was a little curious about how many extreme paths Ye Tian had comprehended, so she asked, "Ye Tian, how many extreme paths have you comprehended?"

"Do you really want to know?"

Ye Tian smiled.

"Well, I want to know!"

Yueli nodded.

"At present, except for the Lord of the Ancients, no one else knows that I have hidden the Extreme Dao, if I tell you, you must make an oath not to leak it, otherwise the situation will be very serious. Ye Tian said.

"Okay, I'll just make an extreme oath, let's do it, isn't it just hiding a little extreme way, what is worth keeping secret!"

Immediately, she made a vow.

If the oath is violated, one's own rudimentary power of the Extreme Way will eat itself, and the rudimentary form of the Extreme Way will crumble, and the foundation will be affected.

Therefore, once an extreme oath is made, no one dares to break it.

After the Moonglass Controller made an Extreme Dao oath, Ye Tian began to show his Extreme Dao power.

Rumble!!!!

A kind of extreme path emerges.

A!

Both!

Three!

Ten kinds!

Hundreds!

......

The Yueli controller looked at the kind of extreme dao that permeated Ye Tian's body, shocked at first, dumbfounded later, and then his head was a mess at the back, not knowing what to say.

"How can this be !!!"

The moon glass controller feels that the cognition has been subverted!

Ye Tian is just a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, the cultivation years are not as long as her, Ye Tian has comprehended several extreme paths before, and she is confused.

But now, Ye Tian actually showed a dense array of extreme paths, and in the blink of an eye, he revealed hundreds of extreme path powers.

"Alright, let's show that!"

Ye Tian reined in his breath, and the power of hundreds of extreme paths dissipated.

What is it to show this? Could it be that Ye Tian has mastered more extreme paths?

However, when the Yueli controller thought about it, he had already comprehended so many extreme paths, and if there were more, it would only be a change in quantity, and there was indeed no difference.

"This guy is just abnormal!" thought to the Moonglass Master.

"Now, I'm qualified to teach you!" Ye Tian said.

"Sort of!" the moon glass controller nodded slightly.

"Now, you show you your mastery of the rudimentary form of the Water Extreme Dao, and after understanding your situation, I will know how to guide you!" Ye Tian demanded.

"Good!"

The Moonglass Controller immediately demonstrated his attainments in the rudimentary form of the Water Extreme.

Subsequently, Ye Tian communicated with the Yueli controller for a long time, and thoroughly understood a lot about the cultivation of the Yueli master.

"Moonglass Master, you leave first, I'll think about how to teach you. "

Ye Tian said.

"Okay, just call me Yueli in the future!"

The Moonglass Controller is gone.

After the Moon Glass Controller left, Ye Tian began to seriously think about how to help the Moon Glass Controller comprehend the Extreme Dao of Water.

First of all, the Moon Glass Controller also has the Water Perfection Grade Ancestral Endowment, and there is nothing wrong with his talent.

Moreover, the comprehension and resources of the master of the moon glass are not bad, otherwise there is no way to cultivate to the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, and master the rudimentary form of the Extreme Dao of Water.

"The moon glass master is also not short of super perfect treasures that contain the water pole path, if you can master the water pole by relying on the super perfect treasure, the moon glass master has already mastered it. Moreover, she has entered the Ancestral Realm of Time and Space, and she still has not completely mastered the Extreme Dao of Water. Therefore, the general method cannot help the Yueli master. "

Ye Tian pondered for a long time, and finally came up with a way.

"Everyone's way of comprehending the Extreme Path is different, and the effect is also different, just like the Extreme Way of Water, but in fact, the rudimentary changes of the Extreme Way of Water that everyone has realized are different, and the way of fusion and combination is ever-changing, and the body is different, and the effect of perception is different. If I first copied Yueli's body, and then used her body to re-perceive the Extreme Dao of Water, find a most suitable path for Yueli's perception, and then teach her little by little, and practice the trend of the rudimentary change of the Extreme Dao of Water. I believe that with her talent, she should be able to make rapid progress. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Do what you think.

So, Ye Tian immediately copied Yueli's body, but not in the Daoless Tower, but on the side of the Nine Rivers Void.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian used Yueli's body to re-cultivate the rudimentary form of the Extreme Dao of Water.
